properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All throughout my history Your faithfulness has walked beside me The winter storms made way for spring In every season, from where I'm standing

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I see the evidence of Your goodness All over my life, all over my life I see Your promises in fulfillment All over my life, all over my life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Help me remember when I'm weak Fear may come, but fear will leave You lead my heart to victory You are my strength and You always will be

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: See the cross, the empty grave The evidence is endless All my sin rolled away Because of You, oh, Jesus See the cross, the empty grave The evidence is endless All my sin rolled away Because of You, oh, Jesus

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I see the evidence of Your goodness All over my life, all over my life I see Your promises in fulfillment All over my life, all over my life, yeah I see the evidence of Your goodness

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All over my life All over my life I see Your promises in fulfillment All over my life, all over my life

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: So why should I fear? The evidence is here Why should I fear? Oh, the evidence is here
